name: group-electron-im
description: 跨平台IM即时通讯客户端 - Electron版

scripts.app:default: cross-env NODE_ENV=default node scripts/env-info.js --mode desktop --env default && npm run sync-protos && npm run app:build && concurrently "npm run build:main -- --watch" "npm run build:renderer -- --watch" "electron ."
scripts.app:dev: node scripts/env-info.js --mode desktop --env dev && npm run sync-protos && npm run app:build && concurrently "npm run build:main -- --watch" "npm run build:renderer -- --watch" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.app:start: node scripts/env-info.js --mode desktop --env prod && npm run app:build && electron .
scripts.app:build: npm run sync-protos && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.web:default: cross-env NODE_ENV=default node scripts/env-info.js --mode web --env default && npm run sync-protos && webpack serve --config web.webpack.config.js
scripts.web:dev: node scripts/env-info.js --mode web --env dev && npm run sync-protos && webpack serve --config web.webpack.config.js
scripts.web:build: node scripts/env-info.js --mode web --env prod && npm run sync-protos && webpack --config web.webpack.config.js
scripts.generate-proto: node ./node_modules/protobufjs-cli/bin/pbjs -t static-module -w commonjs -p protos -o main/generated/proto-bundle.js protos/BaseMessage.proto protos/Message.proto protos/Notification.proto protos/UserInfoProto.proto && node ./node_modules/protobufjs-cli/bin/pbts -o main/generated/proto-bundle.d.ts main/generated/proto-bundle.js

author: Group Team
